body.raw:
# Box

Box is the most abstract component on top of which all other Chakra UI components are built. By default, it renders a `div` element.

## Import

```jsx live=false
import { Box } from '@node-real/bee';
```

## Usage

```jsx
<Box bg="scene.warning.normal" w="100%" p={16} color="white">
  This is the Box
</Box>
```

### as prop

You can use the as prop to change the element render, just like styled-components.

```jsx
<Box as="button" borderRadius={8} bg="scene.warning.normal" color="white" px={16} h={32}>
  Button
</Box>
```
